intended_use: InferRead Lung CT.AI is comprised of computer assisted reading tools designed to aid the radiologist in the detection of pulmonary nodules ≥ 4mm during the review of CT examinations of the chest on an
intended_use_full: InferRead Lung CT.AI is comprised of computer assisted reading tools designed to aid the radiologist in the detection of pulmonary nodules ≥ 4mm during the review of CT examinations of the chest on an asymptomatic population ≥ 55 years old. InferRead Lung CT.AI requires that both lungs be in the field of view. InferRead Lung CT.AI provides adjunctive information and is not intended to be used without the original CT series.
target_condition: pulmonary nodules on chest CT examination
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated in the document
other_metrics: Nodule Registration Match Rate: 0.970 (95% CI: 0.947-0.994); 0-6 month interval: 0.976 (95% CI: 0.911-1.0); 6-12 month interval: 1.000; 12-24 month interval: 0.938 (95% CI: 0.880-0.997). Nodule Lobe Localization Accuracy Rate: 0.957 (95% CI: 0.929-0.986). Lung Lobe Segmentation Dice Coefficient: 0.966 (95% CI: 0.962-0.969).
